description: Baseline security requirements to prevent common vulnerabilities. Covers secrets, input handling, dependencies, and authentication hygiene.

requirements.text: Pre-commit hook runs secret scanning (e.g., Gitleaks) to block commits containing API keys, tokens, passwords, or credentials
requirements.intent: Secrets must never reach the repository
requirements.verifiable_by: Attempt to commit a file containing a test secret pattern; confirm commit is blocked

requirements.text: CI pipeline runs deep secret scanning (e.g., TruffleHog) across full repo history on every PR
requirements.intent: Historical secret leaks must be caught before merge
requirements.verifiable_by: Open PR with repo containing a planted historical secret; confirm CI flags it

requirements.text: All external input (user input, API request bodies, query parameters, file uploads) is validated and sanitized at system boundaries before processing
requirements.intent: Untrusted input must never reach business logic raw
requirements.verifiable_by: Send malformed/malicious input to each entry point; confirm rejection or safe handling

requirements.text: Dependencies are scanned for known vulnerabilities in CI (e.g., npm audit, Dependabot, Snyk) and critical/high findings block merge
requirements.intent: Known vulnerable dependencies must not ship
requirements.verifiable_by: Introduce a dependency with a known CVE; confirm CI blocks the PR

requirements.text: Sensitive data (tokens, session IDs, PII) is never logged in plaintext, included in URLs, or exposed in client-side error messages
requirements.intent: Sensitive data must not leak through side channels
requirements.verifiable_by: Trigger error paths and log outputs; grep for sensitive patterns in logs, URLs, and responses

requirements.text: Authentication tokens have expiration, and session invalidation is enforced on logout and password change
requirements.intent: Stale credentials must not grant access
requirements.verifiable_by: Log out or change password; confirm old tokens are rejected
